title: GitHub - willmeyers/coypa: A fun way to manage your clipboard
excerpt: A fun way to manage your clipboard. Contribute to willmeyers/coypa development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
coypa is a fun way to manage your clipboard.
This is more of a proof of convept than anything. I saw something online that inspired this so I made it

Install

brew install sdl3
git clone https://github.com/willmeyers/coypa
cd coypa
./scripts/bundle.sh
open dist/                  # drag coypa.app to /Applications

Grant Accessibility

coypa has to notice the paste key being held anywhere, which macOS only permits through a keyboard event tap:

System Settings ▸ Privacy & Security ▸ Accessibility → add coypa.app

Grant it to the app bundle, not your terminal — macOS ties this permission to an app's code-signing identity, so running the bare binary attaches the grant to whatever launched it.

Without permission coypa still collects copies; only the hold-to-wheel trigger goes quiet, and ⌘V behaves exactly as normal.

Without permission coypa still collects copies; only the hold-to-wheel trigger goes quiet, and ⌘V behaves exactly as normal.

sentences.en: Grant it to the app bundle, not your terminal — macOS ties this permission to an app's code-signing identity, so running the bare binary attaches the grant to whatever launched it.

content_html_zh:
coypa 是一种管理剪贴板的有趣方式。 这更像是一个 concept 的证明。 我在网上看到一些东西启发了这个，所以我做了它

安装

brew install sdl3
git clone https://github.com/willmeyers/coypa
cd coypa
./scripts/bundle.sh
open dist/                  # drag coypa.app to /Applications

授予可访问性

coypa 必须注意在任何地方按住粘贴键，macOS 只允许通过键盘事件点击：

系统设置 ▸ 隐私和安全 ▸ 辅助功能 → 添加 coypa.app

将其授予应用程序包，而不是您的终端 - macOS 将此权限与应用程序的代码签名身份相关联，因此运行裸二进制文件会将授予附加到启动它的任何内容。

未经许可，coypa 仍会收集副本；只有握轮扳机变得安静，并且 ⌘V 的行为与正常情况完全相同。
